appstream.directoryconfig.DirectoryName.Docs: The fully qualified name of the directory (for example, corp.example.com).

appstream.directoryconfig.Organizational.Docs: The distinguished names of the organizational units for computer accounts.

appstream.directoryconfig.ServiceAccount.Docs: The credentials for the service account used by the streaming instance to connect to the directory. Do not use this parameter directly. Use `ServiceAccountCredentials` as an input parameter with `noEcho` as shown in the [Parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/parameters-section-structure.html). For best practices information, see [Do Not Embed Credentials in Your Templates](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/best-practices.html#creds).
